payload.friendly_name: Common Docs query — CLI retrieval index
payload.purpose_context: Charter, doctrine, and glossary already expose --json retrieval; Common Docs is the last canonical knowledge home with no query API. This mission adds a generated, freshness-gated docs index + a glossary-shaped query CLI, reusing the existing inventory_lockfile generator/gate + the glossary query pattern rather than new infra. Move 3 of docs/plans/engineering-notes/agent-knowledge-canonical-homes.md.
payload.purpose_tldr: Give agents and harnesses a first-class 'spec-kitty docs query --json' retrieval surface over Common Docs (title + heading-anchor + abstract index), closing the one canonical-knowledge gap that still requires ad-hoc file globbing.

reason: Ready for review: packaged src/specify_cli/docs/index_model.py (Anchor/DocsQueryEntry/render_index/parse_index/compare_index/IndexDrift/DocsIndexStore/DEFAULT_INDEX_PATH, no scripts import) + scripts/docs/docs_index.py generator (generate_index/scan_headings/resolve_title/resolve_abstract/slug_for_headings/run_generate_and_compare/__main__, reuses parse_frontmatter+DivioType+split_frontmatter+canonical slugify+ordinal pattern, never forks). Generated+committed docs/development/3-2-docs-retrieval-index.yaml over 646 live pages, --strict round-trips exit 0. 24 tests in tests/docs/test_docs_index.py all green (T001 red-first byte-stability via ascending-path assertion + subprocess regen under different PYTHONHASHSEED; T002-T004 unit coverage; T005 live-index sanity; T006 positive slugify-import + C-001 no-PageInventoryEntry + src/scripts layering AST assertions). ruff clean, mypy clean (--explicit-package-bases --follow-imports=skip to isolate pre-existing unrelated mypy debt in generate_kitty_specs_docs.py, which WP01 does not own/touch). Full tests/docs/ (551) and shared-package-boundary/pyproject-shape/terminology arch suites green — no regressions.
